## List publishes

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200` | The request has succeeded. |

| `403` | Access is forbidden. |
| `404` | The server cannot find the requested resource. |
| `409` | The request conflicts with the current state of the server. |
| `429` | Client error |
| `500` | Server error |
